exploration_notes: Kubernetes implements lease-based leader election in client-go/tools/leaderelection/. The core is LeaderElector.Run() which calls acquire() then renew(). acquire() loops calling tryAcquireOrRenew() which uses a Kubernetes Lease object (via LeaseLock) as a distributed lock—Get/Create/Update on coordination/v1 Lease resources. Failover happens when the leader fails to renew within LeaseDuration; other candidates detect the expired lease and atomically update it. leasecandidate.go adds the newer Co
